/tmp/codeql-scratch-6feca9691a3b4459/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/main_d2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/markdown.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/themes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/d2d_init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/syntax.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/file_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/overlays.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinta.dir/src/editor.cpp.o -o tinta  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/tinta/tinta/_codeql_build_dir/_deps/md4c-build/src: _deps/md4c-build/src/libmd4c.so.0.5.2 -ld2d1 -ldwrite -lshell32 -lwindowscodecs -lurlmon -lole32
